## Imperfect Human Feedback: Inconsistency {.nav-feedback visibility="uncounted"}

{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency/time.qmd >}}

<!-- [@inconsistent]{style="font-size: 0.8em;"}. -->

## Imperfect Human Feedback: Inconsistency {.nav-feedback visibility="uncounted"}

{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency/false-beliefs.qmd >}}

[@inconsistent]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"}.
